title: IndustryCraft
description: This is the official modpack for the IndustryCraft Minecraft server. Claim land, build industries, trade with others, go to war and claim resource nodes.
body:
# Official modpack for the Magic & Machinery Server #

This modpack aims to bring technology of the Edwardian era to Minecraft. At the core of this pack, the Create mod allows players to design and build all sorts of functional machinery. Expanding upon this notion, addons like Crafts and Additions, Steam n' Rails, and Farmer's Delight bring more ways to use energy and machinery. While one player may be pushing the industrial revolution along, another may focus on more... War related pursuits. The Create: Big Cannons mod, and various other combat and war tech themed mods provide a contrasting playstyle. Both paths converge when it comes to controlling "molten vents" that function as infinite resource nodes for ores that are not typically infinite.

### If you enjoy any of the following subjects, you may want to try this pack: ###
- Building
- Designing
- Exploring
- Hunting
- Fighting
- Cooking
- Brewing
- Art

## For more information, join the official discord here: ##
[https://discord.gg/pfDDZuA9sK](https://discord.gg/pfDDZuA9sK)
